commit.message:
Add full finance toolkit — 7 tools in one app

- app.py: home page with tool overview
- pages/1: 5-Year Financial Model (moved from root)
- pages/2: Annual Budget (existing)
- pages/3: Lending Calculator (loan + mortgage with early repayment)
- pages/4: Portfolio Analysis (Sharpe, VaR, risk/return scatter)
- pages/5: Stock Comparison (2 stocks, correlation, ratios)
- pages/6: Commodities Dashboard (gold, silver, oil, gas, copper, wheat)
- pages/7: Stock Analysis (any ticker, MAs, volatility, company info)

All charts rebuilt in Plotly. Consistent styling across all pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Annual Budget tool (1-year P&L with monthly breakdown)

- Sales forecast, direct costs, overheads by category
- Monthly P&L table with FY totals and % of revenue
- KPI cards: Revenue, Gross Profit, Overheads, EBITDA
- 4 charts: Revenue vs Costs, Monthly EBITDA, Overhead breakdown, Cumulative EBITDA
- Excel template download + upload
- PDF export with branded report

commit.message:
fix: data sync + remember me login feature (v75)

- StoreSync: Replace isMounted guard with onAuthStateChange listener
  - Fixes sync not loading after login (was blocked by isMounted ref)
  - Now properly detects SIGNED_IN/SIGNED_OUT events
  - Adds isAuthenticated guard to prevent unauthenticated API calls
  - Adds isLoading guard to prevent duplicate remote loads
- Login: Implement "remember me" functionality
  - Remember ON: Save email+password, session persists across browser close
  - Remember OFF: Auto-sign-out when browser is reopened (session guard)
  - Auto-fill saved credentials on login page mount
  - Add proper name/autoComplete attributes for browser password manager
- Bump SW cache v74 → v75

commit.message:
Add inline task editing, deletion, and per-phase task creation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add comprehensive behavioral and end-to-end test suite (#6)

* Add behavioral test suite for cross-component integration flows

New test files covering complex behavioral scenarios with mocked LLM calls:
- test_behavioral.py: Correction loop→neurosis→growth feedback, interrupt
  injection, defense profile degradation, convergence clusters, escalation
  spirals, outcome→defense feedback, repression loop detection
- test_orchestrator_behavior.py: Task lifecycle phases, retry logic, child
  task decomposition, crash recovery, evaluation parsing, tool use loops
- test_defense_mapping.py: Parameterized tests for all 15 defense mechanism
  action mappings, growth-aware context verification

Shared fixtures added to conftest.py (mind factory, LLM response helpers).
49 new tests, 199 total — all passing.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01T47pPNvu43zZBLJjhE6JoV

* Add e2e test suite with real LLM calls behind ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

14 end-to-end tests that hit the real Anthropic API, gated behind
`@pytest.mark.e2e` and auto-skipped when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is absent.

Test scenarios:
- Conversation: greeting response, multi-turn context retention, burst
  limits, log persistence
- Outcome classifier: positive, correction, frustration, neutral signal
  classification with real Haiku calls
- Chat + outcome: outcome classification fires on 2nd turn, corrections
  recorded in repetition detector
- Interrupts: interrupt content influences response, consumed only once
- Promotions: directive shapes behavior, memory provides retrievable context

Run with: pytest -m e2e -v
Exclude: pytest -m "not e2e"

https://claude.ai/code/session_01T47pPNvu43zZBLJjhE6JoV

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: nested captures, regex backreferences, and x operator precedence (#810)

- Add hierarchical subcapture storage to RegexCaptures for nested capture
  groups ($0[0], $0[0][0], etc.)
- Implement regex backreference atoms ($0, $1, etc. inside patterns)
- Fix x/xx operator precedence to bind tighter than ~ (concatenation),
  preventing timeout on expressions like '$' ~ 1 x 1000000
- Fix join() on Match/Instance objects
- Fix regex code block $0 ordering (set before block execution)
- Add 2 newly passing roast tests to whitelist

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: speed up screenshot scripts with parallel capture and smart waits (#1838)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix perform mode: invert MIDI row mapping to match physical controller

Push/LinnStrument bottom (low MIDI) was mapping to display top (slots 0-3),
causing user to go wrong direction. Now:
- Controller top (high MIDI, grid row 6) → display top (slots 0-3)
- Controller bottom (low MIDI, grid row 3) → display bottom (slots 12-15)
- Matches keyboard layout (1234=top → slots 0-3)

Cache bust v3.9.4

- Add Mutex-based loading guard in DetailViewModel (replaces volatile boolean)
- Add Coil listener for Shared Element Transition timing (replaces doOnPreDraw)
- Add Channel-based events in SettingsViewModel for watch history clear feedback
- Add favorite sort feature with toolbar subtitle indicator

- Update documentation (CLAUDE.md, README.md)

commit.message:
fix(v2.3.0): resolve data display bugs and expand to 50 rooms

- Fix critical Java 17 serialization bug: Gson could not reflect on
  LocalDate/LocalDateTime private fields due to module system restrictions,
  causing ReservationServlet and DashboardServlet to return 500 errors.
  Added custom JsonSerializer type adapters for both date types so they
  serialize as ISO-8601 strings (e.g. "2025-06-15").

- Fix view-reservation.html crashing when server returns an error object
  instead of an array: added Array.isArray() guard in displayResults() so
  error messages are shown gracefully instead of triggering TypeError.

- Fix session redirect loop: checkSession() in app.js now only redirects
  to login on HTTP 401, not on any API error, preventing staff from being
  logged out when the DB is slow or returning warnings.

- Fix missing mealPlan parameter in add-reservation.html form submission.

- Fix DashboardServlet to always return fullName/role from session before
  the DB try-catch, so Welcome message and Reports access work even when
  DB queries are slow.

- Expand hotel rooms from 8 to 50 (22 Standard, 20 Deluxe, 8 Suite)
  with numbered room codes (STD-TW-01..08, DLX-OV-01..07, STE-PR-01..03,
  etc.) to reflect the full resort capacity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

优化尺度标定方法：从AABB改为最大跨度

问题：
- 旧方法使用轴对齐边界框（AABB）长度作为标定基准
- AABB长度依赖坐标系方向，煤堆斜向时会偏大
- 用户输入的"地面真实长度"含义不明确

解决方案：
- 改用凸包顶点间最大距离作为标定基准
- 最大跨度唯一且旋转不变
- 用户可直接测量煤堆最远两点的实际距离

优势：
1. 唯一性：不依赖坐标系方向
2. 直观性：用户可直接测量
3. 准确性：避免AABB的方向依赖
4. 旋转不变性：验证显示误差<0.000001

修改文件：
- coal_pile_volume_processor.py: 添加最大跨度计算
- coal_pile_ply_analyzer.py: 更新UI和标定逻辑

fix: remove stageIndex filter from NeonSportz games API call (#1)

Filtering by stageIndex=1 in the URL prevented older seasons from being
fetched if their games have a different stageIndex in the API. Each game's
stageIndex is already stored from the API response object, so the URL filter
was redundant and causing missing seasons after re-sync.
